description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a symmetrical facade and a flat, tiled roof. The front of the house is defined by a covered porch supported by columns, with two palm trees and a paved driveway leading up to it. Large windows are arranged in even rows across both floors, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The backyard includes a swimming pool with lounge chairs and an umbrella, as well as landscaped greenery and a parking area with a car. The exterior is finished in neutral tones, with white and gray dominating the color palette, and the property is surrounded by several trees. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, a front porch with columns, and a backyard pool area. The exterior features white and gray tones, palm trees, and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch with columns, two palm trees, driveway, and a glimpse of the backyard pool.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked car, and the symmetrical window arrangement along the side facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, umbrella, and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool area, umbrella, and the side of the house with palm trees and driveway visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a covered porch, supported by columns, flanked by palm trees and accessed via a paved driveway.
